page_metadata.biotools__summary: It is a public toxicogenomics database based on the Japanese Toxicogenomics Projects (TGP and TGP2), developed so that a wider community of researchers could utilize the fruits of this research. This API provides access to the RNA microarray (Affymetrix) samples from Open TG-GATEs. Rat data, as well as human data is provided, for repeat and single doses.",
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: It is a public toxicogenomics database based on the Japanese Toxicogenomics Projects (TGP and TGP2), developed so that a wider community of researchers could utilize the fruits of this research. This API provides access to the RNA microarray (Affymetrix) samples from Open TG-GATEs. Rat data, as well as human data is provided, for repeat and single doses.",
